refined_question: How can graph neural networks effectively utilize graph structure to improve node classification performance with limited labeled nodes?
intent: Understand methods to mitigate overfitting in graph neural networks for node classification in the domain of graph learning with scarce labels and without adding more labels
search_hint: graph neural networks, node classification, limited labels, graph structure, overfitting mitigation, semi-supervised learning (SSL), transductive learning, inductive learning, graph attention networks (GAT), graph convolutional networks (GCN)
